description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named ci-push that runs on push to calamares and 3.2.x-stable branches, on pull request opened, reopened, or synchronize, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow should set up environment variables for a build, then run a single ubuntu-latest job in a custom Docker container. In this job, prepare the source code using a custom checkout action, install dependencies with a bash script, and perform a build using another custom action.
